summary: Complete testing of Employee Filter feature in ReportModal. All backend tests passed (9/9). Frontend tests confirmed employee filter dropdown appears for admin/muhasebe users when >1 employees exist, filters transactions by created_by, and updates report title with employee name.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) on initial render - cosmetic only
React console warnings: '<span> cannot be a child of <select/option/tr>' - caused by visual editor wrapper, functionality works correctly

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/employees returns list of employees in org - PASSED
Backend: /api/employees contains current admin user - PASSED
Backend: Create satis employee appears in employees list - PASSED
Backend: Transactions have created_by field for filtering - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/transactions returns created_by field - PASSED
Backend: /api/employees has name field for dropdown display - PASSED
Backend: Transactions can be filtered by created_by param - PASSED
Backend: Unauthenticated access to /api/employees rejected - PASSED
UI: Employee filter dropdown (data-testid='report-employee-filter') appears for admin when >1 employees - PASSED
UI: 'Tüm Çalışanlar' option shows all transactions (2 total) - PASSED
UI: Filter by specific employee shows only their transactions - PASSED
UI: Report title shows 'Finansal Durum Raporu - Test Galeri' when admin selected - PASSED
UI: Report title shows 'Finansal Durum Raporu - Ahmet Satış' when satis selected - PASSED
UI: Employee dropdown options show name with role (e.g., 'Test Galeri (Admin)') - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: ReportModal.jsx correctly implements employee filter (lines 381-398) with proper role check and employees.length > 1 condition
useEffect on line 213-217 fetches employees via usersAPI.getEmployees() for admin/muhasebe roles
Transaction filtering by created_by implemented in displayTransactions useMemo (lines 253-256)
Report title correctly appends employee name when selectedEmployee !== 'all' (lines 449-454 in preview, lines 319-320 in print)
Backend /api/employees endpoint (line 798-803) returns id, email, name, phone, role for all org users

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all employee filter feature UI tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Created satis user (test-satis@emergent.com) in Test Galeri org for testing multi-employee filter. Created 2 test transactions (1 per user) then deleted after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee filter feature in ReportModal fully working. Filter dropdown (data-testid='report-employee-filter') only appears when userRole is admin/muhasebe AND employees.length > 1. Filter works by matching transaction.created_by against selected employee id. Report title in preview and print includes employee name when filtered (e.g., 'Finansal Durum Raporu - Ahmet'). API /api/employees returns all users in org with id, email, name, phone, role fields.

mocked_apis.Email verification: MOCKED - verification code displayed on screen

features_verified.backend_employees_endpoint: WORKING - GET /api/employees returns employee list with id, email, name, phone, role
features_verified.frontend_employee_filter_dropdown: WORKING - Shows for admin/muhasebe when >1 employees exist
features_verified.frontend_filter_by_created_by: WORKING - Selecting employee filters displayTransactions by created_by field
features_verified.frontend_print_title_with_employee: WORKING - Print HTML title includes employee name
